1.1.0.en: Moved microphone audio date from UDP to API. Fixed issue with Agent timing. Switched transcription model. Set interrupt_response to false.

1.1.2.en: Fixed so agent better understands user input and it's own instrunctions

1.1.4.en: Agent should understand even better now, and be less critical to user input. Also other bugfixes.

1.2.0.en: Adds weather answers and awareness of your local time and location. Faster, smoother conversations with better speech understanding. Supports the latest Voice PE firmware, and fixes device pairing so devices show up reliably when you add them.

1.3.0.en: Set timers and alarms with your voice — just say "set a 10 minute timer" or "wake me at 7". The device counts down on its LED ring and chimes when time's up, and you can cancel it by voice. New Flow cards let you start, cancel, and react to timers in your automations, and the device tile now shows the active timer's name and time remaining.

1.4.0.en: Choose your voice engine: Google Gemini is now supported alongside OpenAI, each with its own selectable voices. The assistant now speaks many more languages — pick yours in Settings. Follow-up questions feel more natural in back-and-forth conversations, and asking for the current time or date is now reliable.
